payload.answer: Duplicate Slack delivery detected and ignored. No additional memory was committed.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice
Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans

entity_resolution.reason: This is the same Slack event ID delivered twice; to preserve idempotency, do not create or update durable memory on the retry.

details: Recognized retry/duplicate delivery for the same Slack event ID.

repair_options: If the original delivery was not actually persisted, process the event exactly once using the Slack event ID as the idempotency key.
If needed, store a transient ingestion receipt for the event ID to prevent duplicate commits on retries.
